note: Explicitly-predicated relationship charts, each a pure projection of edges.json. Every edge is separately cited to the infobox field, category, curated table, or named page that states it. Directed: parent_of (parent→child), host_of (symbiont→host), succeeded_by (predecessor→successor), commands (commander→commanded), clone_instance_of (clone→line). sibling_of/spouse_of/allied_with are undirected.

family.label: Family & marriage web
family.note: parent_of (parent→child), sibling_of, spouse_of — from character infoboxes.

edges.relation_note: Worf infobox lists the Rozhenkos as adoptive/foster parents; Mogh is biological.
Jadzia infobox lists Alexander explicitly as stepson (she married his father Worf; mother was K'Ehleyr).
Jake's biological mother is Jennifer Sisko; Kasidy is stepmother via marriage to Benjamin.
Kira carried Kirayoshi as maternal surrogate for Keiko O'Brien; not the biological parent.
Nog's biological mother is Prinadora; Leeta is stepmother via marriage to Rom.
Worf infobox lists Sergey Rozhenko as adoptive father; Mogh is biological.
Non-blood bond via the Klingon R'uustai ceremony; infobox labels Worf his adoptive brother.
Worf was adopted by the Rozhenkos; Nikolai is their biological son — foster/adoptive brothers, not blood.

dax_hosts.label: Dax symbiont host set
dax_hosts.note: host_of only. Hosts are typed primary/temporary/alternate; the source gives no machine-readable succession order, so none is charted.

edges.note: alternate timeline; DS9: Children of Time

dominion_command.label: Dominion chain of command & Weyoun clone line
dominion_command.note: commands (species doctrine), clone_instance_of + succeeded_by (Weyoun, sourced per clone page), and Dominion org membership.

edges.basis: Vorta "genetically-engineered by the Founders of the Dominion... served the Founders"
Vorta act as "field commanders"; Jem'Hadar are "the military arm of the Dominion"
The Vorta clone '''Weyoun 6''' was activated shortly after Weyoun 5's demise
When the Vorta clone '''Weyoun 7''' was activated, he ordered a massive search to prevent Weyoun 6 from
The Vorta clone '''Weyoun 8''' was activated shortly after the humiliating death of Weyoun 7

cardassian_web.label: Cardassian affiliations & families
cardassian_web.note: Cardassian/Obsidian Order org membership plus family edges among Cardassians (Tain→Garak, Dukat→Ziyal).

bajoran_web.label: Bajoran affiliations & families
bajoran_web.note: Bajoran militia/government/religious org membership plus family among Bajorans. Affiliation membership, not a command hierarchy.
